info.title: Ocrolus API
info.description: Ocrolus document automation platform API. Covers Classify, Capture, Detect, and Analyze capabilities.

Bearer.name: Authorization
Bearer.description: Bearer JWT token from OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant

post.description: OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant. Returns JWT with 24h expiry. Refresh at 12h.
Returns dict with book_pk (int) and book_uuid (str).

get.description: Some tenants may use /v1/book/{book_pk}/status instead. Run validate_endpoints.py to confirm.

get.summary: Get Book associated with a loan
Get loan details from a Book

post.description: Max file size: 200MB. form_type is optional; cannot be used for bank statements.
Contains multiple document types in a single PDF.

get.description: Identifies 300+ document types with confidence scores (0-1).
Organizes forms into logical groups with uniqueness values.
Returns authenticity scores (0-100), reason codes, and signal types for all documents.
Returns binary image with fraud signal overlays. Cannot be hotlinked.
Returns daily balances, PII, and time series data.

parameters.name: min_days_to_include
parameters.description: Min days for most recent month (default 0, use 32 for full months only)

get.description: Returns transactions with categories and tags.
